title: pimelea subvillifera
intro: Pimelea subvillifera, also known as Billygoat plum, is a plant species native to Australia, characterized by its small, white flowers and edible fruits. The plant has been used in traditional Aboriginal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pimelea subvillifera include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Pimelea subvillifera can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its fruits can be eaten fresh or used in jams and preserves.
